section_title: order on contributory conclusive evidence:-- (1) An order made by the Court on a contrubutory shall, subject to
content:
273. order on contributory conclusive evidence:-- (1) An order made by the Court on a contrubutory shall, subject to
any right of appeal, be conclusive evidence that the money, if any, thereby appearing to be due or ordered to be paid is due.
(2) All other pertinent matters stated in the order shall be taken to be truly stated as against all persons, and in all
proceedings whatsoever.

sub_sections.text:
An order made by the Court on a contrubutory shall, subject to
any right of appeal, be conclusive evidence that the money, if any, thereby appearing to be due or ordered to be paid is due.

All other pertinent matters stated in the order shall be taken to be truly stated as against all persons, and in all
proceedings whatsoever.
